name: current_vivado_preferences
full_help:
current_vivado_preferences

Description: 
Returns the vivado prefernces object.

Syntax: 
current_vivado_preferences  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
vivado_preferences

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
